'''mamutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakiness|oakiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakiness|oakiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mamutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæmitith|mæmitith]] || [[word:mæmitij|mæmitij]] || [[word:mæmitish|mæmitish]] || [[word:mæmiti|mæmiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamumututh|mamumututh]] || [[word:mamumutuj|mamumutuj]] || [[word:mamumutush|mamumutush]] || [[word:mamumutu|mamumutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamututh|mamututh]] || [[word:mamutuj|mamutuj]] || [[word:mamutush|mamutush]] || [[word:mamutu|mamutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamuftufth|mamuftufth]] || [[word:mamuftufj|mamuftufj]] || [[word:mamuftufsh|mamuftufsh]] || [[word:mamuftuf|mamuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mamututhu|mamututhu]] || [[word:mamutuju|mamutuju]] || [[word:mamutushu|mamutushu]] || [[word:mamutuku|mamutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mamututh|mamututh]] || [[word:mamutuj|mamutuj]] || [[word:mamutush|mamutush]] || [[word:mamutu|mamutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mamututhul|mamututhul]] || [[word:mamutujul|mamutujul]] || [[word:mamutushul|mamutushul]] || [[word:mamutukul|mamutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mamutuuthuthu|mamutuuthuthu]] || [[word:mamutuujuju|mamutuujuju]] || [[word:mamutuushushu|mamutuushushu]] || [[word:mamutuuku|mamutuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mamututhun|mamututhun]] || [[word:mamutujun|mamutujun]] || [[word:mamutushun|mamutushun]] || [[word:mamutukun|mamutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mamututhuoro|mamututhuoro]] || [[word:mamutujuoro|mamutujuoro]] || [[word:mamutushuoro|mamutushuoro]] || [[word:mamutukuoro|mamutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
